calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2006 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-17-2006 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Apr-04-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minors' Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-19-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Papina Thompson.
Kenneth Greenstein, Esq. for Petitioner: Jewell Arceneaux, present as Guardian at litem for: Giovonni Leiteish Arceneaux and Steven Arceneaux Jr., minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved as follows:
Attorney's Fees $500.00
A net balance of $1,500.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 4648 Misssion St., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
Counsel to prepare an Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account, submitting to Dept. 218 for signature.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2005 Set For Trial On Feb-06-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jan-23-06 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-15-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-13-2005 Continued To Jul-01-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
